title: Developing a Supply Chain Optimization Model
scenario: Create a supply chain optimization model for a manufacturer that sources raw materials from multiple suppliers. The model should optimize the selection of suppliers, transportation routes, and inventory levels to minimize costs and reduce lead times. The final output should be a JSON object with the optimal supplier selection and transportation routes.
constraints: Must include a detailed explanation of the algorithm used to select suppliers and optimize transportation routes.
Must provide a clear description of how inventory levels were optimized.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the algorithm used to select suppliers and optimize transportation routes is clearly described and relevant to the task.
Verify that the supplier selection is correctly generated and makes sense in the context of the manufacturer.
Check if the transportation routes are correctly generated and make sense in the context of the manufacturer.
Verify that the inventory levels are correctly optimized and make sense in the context of the manufacturer.
